# Load necessary libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

# Remove Outliers Function
```{r}
remove_outliers <- function(x, na.rm = TRUE, ...) {
    qnt <- quantile(x, probs = c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = na.rm, ...)
    H <- 1.5 * IQR(x, na.rm = na.rm)
    y <- x
    y[x < (qnt[1] - H)] <- NA
    y[x > (qnt[2] + H)] <- NA
    return(y)
}
```

# Load the data

## Original
```{r}

df_old <- read.csv("./results/model_evaluation_results_allData.csv")
df_old_filtered <- df_old %>%
    filter((modelname == "U-NET" & crop == "wheat") |
                 (modelname == "SegFormer" & crop == "sorghum")) %>%
    select(c(crop,genotype,modelname,IoU))

df_old_filtered$train_genotype <- "allGenotypes"
df_old_filtered <- df_old_filtered %>%
    mutate(across(IoU, ~remove_outliers(.x))) %>%
    drop_na()
summary(df_old_filtered)
```

## Cross Genotype
```{r}

df <- read.csv("./results/model_evaluation_crossGenotype.csv")

head(df)

df <- df %>%
    select(c(crop, genotype, modelname, IoU, train_genotype)) %>%
    mutate(across(IoU, ~remove_outliers(.x))) %>%
    drop_na()
head(df)
summary(df)
```

## Combine Original and Cross Genotype
```{r}
df_combined <- bind_rows(df_old_filtered, df)
head(df_combined)
summary(df_combined)
```

# Making graph

```{r}
df_bar_genotype <- df_combined %>%
  group_by(crop, train_genotype, genotype) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_IoU = mean(IoU, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_IoU = sd(IoU, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    lower = pmax(0, mean_IoU - sd_IoU),
    upper = mean_IoU + sd_IoU,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(df_bar_genotype)

df_bar_genotype <- df_bar_genotype %>%
  mutate(crop = trimws(tolower(as.character(crop))))

df_bar_genotype$crop <- factor(df_bar_genotype$crop, levels = c("wheat", "sorghum"))

df_bar_genotype$train_genotype <- factor(
  df_bar_genotype$train_genotype,
  levels = c("allGenotypes", "first_half", "second_half")
)

train_genotypes <- unique(as.character(df_bar_genotype$train_genotype))
df_bar_genotype$train_genotype <- factor(df_bar_genotype$train_genotype, levels = train_genotypes)

purdue_colors <- c(
  "black" = "#000000",
  "gold" = "#CEB888",
  "steel" = "#555960"
)

color_vals <- setNames(purdue_colors[seq_len(length(train_genotypes))], train_genotypes)

label_vals <- case_when(
  train_genotypes == "allGenotypes" ~ "All Genotypes",
  train_genotypes == "first_half" ~ "First Half",
  train_genotypes == "second_half" ~ "Second Half",
  TRUE                 ~ train_genotypes
)
names(label_vals) <- train_genotypes

```

## Making Table comparing stats between all and half Trained
```{r}
# Pivot to wide format: one row per genotype, columns for each train_genotype
table_wide <- df_bar_genotype %>%
  select(crop, genotype, train_genotype, mean_IoU, sd_IoU) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = train_genotype,
    values_from = c(mean_IoU, sd_IoU)
  )

# Calculate differences, variance, and standard deviation for each genotype
table_stats <- table_wide %>%
  mutate(
    diff_first_vs_all = mean_IoU_first_half - mean_IoU_allGenotypes,
    diff_second_vs_all = mean_IoU_second_half - mean_IoU_allGenotypes,
    var_allGenotypes = (sd_IoU_allGenotypes)^2,
    var_first_half = (sd_IoU_first_half)^2,
    var_second_half = (sd_IoU_second_half)^2
  ) %>%
  select(
    crop, genotype,
    mean_IoU_allGenotypes, mean_IoU_first_half, mean_IoU_second_half,
    diff_first_vs_all, diff_second_vs_all,
    var_allGenotypes, var_first_half, var_second_half,
    sd_IoU_allGenotypes, sd_IoU_first_half, sd_IoU_second_half
  )

sorghum_1_40 <- table_stats %>%
  filter(crop == "sorghum", genotype %in% 1:40) %>%
  mutate(diff = mean_IoU_second_half - mean_IoU_allGenotypes)

sorghum_41_80 <- table_stats %>%
  filter(crop == "sorghum", genotype %in% 41:80) %>%
  mutate(diff = mean_IoU_first_half - mean_IoU_allGenotypes)

# For wheat: 1-20 (All vs Second), 21-40 (All vs First)
wheat_1_20 <- table_stats %>%
  filter(crop == "wheat", genotype %in% 1:20) %>%
  mutate(diff = mean_IoU_second_half - mean_IoU_allGenotypes)

wheat_21_40 <- table_stats %>%
  filter(crop == "wheat", genotype %in% 21:40) %>%
  mutate(diff = mean_IoU_first_half - mean_IoU_allGenotypes)

# Summarize for each subgroup
summary_table <- tibble(
  group = c(
    "sorghum_1_40_All_vs_Second",
    "sorghum_41_80_All_vs_First",
    "wheat_1_20_All_vs_Second",
    "wheat_21_40_All_vs_First"
  ),
  mean_diff = c(
    mean(sorghum_1_40$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(sorghum_41_80$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(wheat_1_20$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(wheat_21_40$diff, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  variance = c(
    var(sorghum_1_40$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    var(sorghum_41_80$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    var(wheat_1_20$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    var(wheat_21_40$diff, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  std_deviation = c(
    sd(sorghum_1_40$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd(sorghum_41_80$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd(wheat_1_20$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd(wheat_21_40$diff, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
)

print(summary_table)
# ...existing code...

# For sorghum: 1-40 (All vs Second), 41-80 (All vs First)
sorghum_1_40 <- table_stats %>%
  filter(crop == "sorghum", genotype %in% 1:40) %>%
  mutate(diff = mean_IoU_second_half - mean_IoU_allGenotypes)

sorghum_41_80 <- table_stats %>%
  filter(crop == "sorghum", genotype %in% 41:80) %>%
  mutate(diff = mean_IoU_first_half - mean_IoU_allGenotypes)

# For wheat: 1-20 (All vs Second), 21-40 (All vs First)
wheat_1_20 <- table_stats %>%
  filter(crop == "wheat", genotype %in% 1:20) %>%
  mutate(diff = mean_IoU_second_half - mean_IoU_allGenotypes)

wheat_21_40 <- table_stats %>%
  filter(crop == "wheat", genotype %in% 21:40) %>%
  mutate(diff = mean_IoU_first_half - mean_IoU_allGenotypes)

# Summarize for each subgroup
summary_table <- tibble(
  group = c(
    "sorghum_1_40_All_vs_Second",
    "sorghum_41_80_All_vs_First",
    "wheat_1_20_All_vs_Second",
    "wheat_21_40_All_vs_First"
  ),
  mean_diff = c(
    mean(sorghum_1_40$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(sorghum_41_80$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(wheat_1_20$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(wheat_21_40$diff, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  max = c(
    max(sorghum_1_40$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    max(sorghum_41_80$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    max(wheat_1_20$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    max(wheat_21_40$diff, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  min = c(
    min(sorghum_1_40$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    min(sorghum_41_80$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    min(wheat_1_20$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    min(wheat_21_40$diff, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  std_deviation = c(
    sd(sorghum_1_40$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd(sorghum_41_80$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd(wheat_1_20$diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd(wheat_21_40$diff, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
)

print(summary_table)
write.csv(summary_table, "./results/genotype_meanIoU_subgroup_comparison.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

## Wheat Plot
```{r}
# Create one plot for each combination
wheat_plot <- df_bar_genotype %>%
  filter(crop == "wheat", genotype %in% 1:40) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(genotype), y = mean_IoU, fill = train_genotype)) +
  geom_bar(stat='identity', position='dodge')+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
                width = 0.2, color = purdue_colors["black"], linewidth = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = color_vals,
    labels = label_vals,
    breaks = names(label_vals),
    name = "Trained on: ") +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 20), limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0.01)) +
  labs(
    title = "Wheat: IoU by Genotype and Genotypes used for training",
    x = "Genotype",
    y = "Mean IoU ± SD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = purdue_colors["white"], color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = purdue_colors["white"], color = NA),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 9),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 13, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 11),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = purdue_colors["gold"], linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(wheat_plot)
ggsave("./results/IoU_bar_genotype_wheat.png", plot = wheat_plot, width = 18, height = 7, dpi = 600)
```

## Sorghum Plot
```{r}
sorghum_plot <- df_bar_genotype %>%
  filter(crop == "sorghum", genotype %in% 1:80) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(genotype), y = mean_IoU, fill = train_genotype)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), color = purdue_colors["black"], width = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
                width = 0.2, color = purdue_colors["black"], linewidth = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = color_vals,
    labels = label_vals,
    breaks = names(label_vals),
    name = "Trained on: ") +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 20), limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0.01)) +
  labs(
    title = "Sorghum: IoU by Genotype and Genotypes used for training",
    x = "Genotype",
    y = "Mean IoU ± SD"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = purdue_colors["white"], color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = purdue_colors["white"], color = NA),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 9),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 13, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(color = purdue_colors["black"], size = 11),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = purdue_colors["gold"], linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(sorghum_plot)
ggsave("./results/IoU_bar_genotype_sorghum.png", plot = sorghum_plot, width = 22, height = 7, dpi = 600)
```
